title: Phase 1.1: Database & Outcome Tracking
context: First phase of agent learning system. Create task_outcomes table, implement OutcomeTracker service, integrate with worker.py to auto-track completions, add API endpoint for human feedback. See detailed spec in docs/handoffs/learning-phase-1.1-database-tracking.md. This is the foundation - all other phases depend on this.
acceptance: 1) task_outcomes table exists with all columns and indexes. 2) TaskOutcome model in models.py. 3) OutcomeTracker service tracks completions automatically. 4) POST /api/learning/tasks/{id}/feedback endpoint works. 5) A/B control group: 20% of outcomes have learning_disabled=True. 6) Task category/complexity inference working. 7) Unit tests >80% coverage. 8) Integration tests pass. 9) All operations log with [LEARNING] prefix.

title: Phase 1.2: Pattern Extraction & Lesson Creation
context: Extract learnings from task outcomes. Create outcome_learnings table, implement LessonExtractor with rule-based pattern detection (missing tests, unclear names, error handling, validation), add CLI command for manual extraction. See detailed spec in docs/handoffs/learning-phase-1.2-pattern-extraction.md. Depends on Phase 1.1.
acceptance: 1) outcome_learnings table exists. 2) OutcomeLearning model in models.py. 3) LessonExtractor extracts patterns from feedback. 4) 5+ programmer patterns implemented (tests, names, errors, docstrings, validation). 5) CLI command works: python app/cli/extract_learnings.py --agent programmer. 6) GET /api/learning/learnings endpoint. 7) POST /api/learning/extract endpoint. 8) Confidence updates on success/failure. 9) Low-confidence deactivation logic. 10) Unit tests >80% coverage.

title: Phase 1.3: Prompt Enhancement & Learning Injection
context: Complete the learning loop by injecting learnings into prompts. Create PromptEnhancer service, integrate with prompter.py to query and inject relevant learnings, track which learnings were applied, update confidences based on outcomes. See detailed spec in docs/handoffs/learning-phase-1.3-prompt-enhancement.md. Depends on Phases 1.1 and 1.2.
acceptance: 1) PromptEnhancer class implemented. 2) Integration with prompter.py (breaking change - returns tuple now). 3) Feature flag LEARNING_INJECTION_ENABLED. 4) Learnings injected with prefix style. 5) Applied learning IDs stored in TaskOutcome. 6) Confidence updated when tasks complete. 7) Control group gets unmodified prompts. 8) Unit tests >80% coverage. 9) Integration test proves full cycle. 10) Enhancement adds <200ms overhead. 11) Graceful degradation if enhancer fails.

title: Phase 1.4: Metrics, Stats & A/B Test Validation
context: Implement metrics to measure learning system effectiveness. Create LearningStatsCalculator, add GET /api/learning/stats endpoint with A/B test results, statistical significance testing, health monitoring, CLI analysis tool. See detailed spec in docs/handoffs/learning-phase-1.4-metrics-validation.md. Depends on Phases 1.1-1.3. Completes Milestone 1.
acceptance: 1) LearningStatsCalculator implemented. 2) GET /api/learning/stats endpoint with full A/B analysis. 3) GET /api/learning/top-learnings endpoint. 4) GET /api/learning/health endpoint. 5) Statistical significance testing with Chi-squared. 6) CLI tool: python app/cli/analyze_learning.py (stats/top/health). 7) scipy added to requirements.txt. 8) Stats calculation <500ms. 9) Unit tests >80% coverage. 10) Integration tests for all endpoints. 11) Health checks detect common issues.
